ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "facility_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each facility */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the facility was established */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "facility_manager" INTEGER /* ID of the facility manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage unit */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the facility where the unit is located */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the storage unit (e.g., Battery, Capacitor) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the storage unit in kilowatt-hours (kWh) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the storage unit was installed */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service or maintenance */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty expires */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the storage unit */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the storage unit */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the storage unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_units_unit_type FOREIGN KEY ("unit_type") REFERENCES unit_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_units_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy reading */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage unit the reading belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "storage_0" REAL /* Energy level in storage 0 (kWh) */,
  "storage_1" REAL /* Energy level in storage 1 (kWh) */,
  "storage_2" REAL /* Energy level in storage 2 (kWh) */,
  "storage_3" REAL /* Energy level in storage 3 (kWh) */,
  "storage_4" REAL /* Energy level in storage 4 (kWh) */,
  "storage_5" REAL /* Energy level in storage 5 (kWh) */,
  "reading_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the reading was taken (e.g., hourly, daily) */,
  "energy_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source used to charge the storage unit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., Normal, Anomaly, Error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_readings_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES storage_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_readings_energy_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit type (e.g., Battery, Capacitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit type */,
  "lifecycle" TEXT /* Typical lifecycle of the unit type (e.g., 5 years, 10 years) */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the unit type in percentage */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended maintenance frequency (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source (e.g., Solar, Wind, Grid) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy source */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the energy source (e.g., 24/7, Daytime) */,
  "cost_per_kwh" REAL /* Cost per kilowatt-hour of the energy source */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Environmental impact of the energy source (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consumption record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the consumption occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the consumption */,
  "consumption_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy consumed (kWh) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device or system consuming the energy */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the energy consumption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the production occurred */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the production */,
  "production_amount" REAL /* Amount of energy produced (kWh) */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy source */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device or system producing the energy */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the energy production in percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage unit maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., Routine, Repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next service */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES storage_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the alert is related */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage unit where the alert is related */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Low Energy, Overload) */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Open, Resolved) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the alert is assigned */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was resolved */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES storage_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility the report is related to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's findings */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or departments with whom the report was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version history record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_column" TEXT /* Specific column in the table that was changed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., Data correction, Update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
